headline: Assistant Sales Manager-Instor India Pvt Ltd
summary:
Instor India Pvt. Ltd. is the largest manufacturer and direct provider of display, storage and movement solutions for retail stores, and various other industries.

With state-of-the art manufacturing facility, unmatched quality and “we care” pledge, we deliver single stop solutions. Widest range of ready and customized solutions with the highest space utilization technology, most durability, economical pricing and functional designs help you deliver the best customer experience at every touch point and grow your retail footprint. 

We are your backbone for delivering exceptional customer experience. We fully embrace the “Make in India” initiative and stand behind everything we build. 

Clients
Our clients include businesses with a single location to 3,000+ chain of stores. Some of our clients include D-mart, Star Bazaar, Hypercity, Patanjali, Aditya Birla Group, Wellness Forever, Sony, Samsung, and 1000s more. 

Instor Solutions Range
Our unique range comprises of products under 4 distinctive categories:

Display Solutions
Display units, Shelving, Racks, Gondolas, Display Counters, Podiums, PC portal units, Aisle Units, Wired bins and Experience Counters

Storage Solutions
Self-serve showcase, Assisted showcase, Storage  cabinets, Compactors, Metal pallets, Metal cage pallets, Plastic cage pallets, Metainers and Pactoners, Self stackable pallets, Customer and employee lockers

Movement Solutions
Checkout counters, Shopping trolleys, Shopping baskets, Rolling Cages (Packtainers), Metainers (bins with wheels), Platform trolleys

Supermarkets, Hypermarkets, General Stores, Speciality Stores, Consumer Electronics,Sports & Fitness, Apparels & Fashion, Luxury Products, Cosmetics, Jewellery, Stationery & Toys, Automotive, Pharmacy, Footwear, Home Furnishings, Experience Centers.

It then turned into the legacy of two first generation entrepreneurs, Mr. Vamanrai Parekh (Chairman  & Co-founder of Nilkamal Ltd.) and Mr. Sharad Parekh (Managing Director & Co-founder of Nilkamal Ltd.). Apart from its main furniture business, we have invested in Nilkamal Mattrezzz, Moulded furniture, Ready Furniture, @Home, Nilkamal Bubble Guard and Material Handling. Each business complements the other and our resourceful partners have helped boost us into a multinational company. Smart investments and expert management has kept us as the world’s largest producer of moulded plastic furniture and maintained its advantage over its competitors. Our company operates in various sophisticated markets in North America, Australia, Africa, South America and the GCC which all amount to over 30 countries. Apart from this, we have always excelled in its professionalism by having all its manufacturing units ISO certified at different levels such as BIFMA - Level 3 and Greenguard (UK). We have been around for more than three decades and strive to be successful in the many years to come.

headline: Manager - Marketing and Sales at Zomato
summary:
Zomato’s mission statement is “better food for more people.” Since our inception in 2010, we have grown tremendously, both in scope and scale - and emerged as India’s most trusted brand during the pandemic, along with being one of the largest hyperlocal delivery networks in the country.

Today, Zomato represents a wide range of cultures through its diversified 5000+ team members, 3.5 lakh+ delivery partners, and our biggest collective of the finest restaurant partners. We are grateful that our business is able to provide upward social and economic movement for millions of households – of our delivery partners, as well as restaurant staff. We think of all of us as one big family!

Our passion is driven by purpose and we take immense pride in our initiative ‘Feeding India’, one of India’s largest not-for-profits working to ensure that nobody in India goes to bed hungry. As of now, Feeding India provides over 150,000 nutritious meals to the underprivileged every day.

In April 2020, Feeding India ran one of the largest food distribution drives in the world during the first wave of COVID, and distributed 78 million meals to daily wagers across the length and breadth of the country.

During the second wave of COVID-19, Feeding India was again the first to act. We were able to source over 9,000 oxygen concentrators and distributed them for free to government hospitals across the country. This helped save millions of lives during one of the worst humanitarian crises faced by India in the recent times.

We’re innovating hard to make last-mile delivery carbon neutral, to eliminate the use of plastic packaging, create meaningful opportunities in the gig economy, and to feed our country’s ever-growing appetite for high-quality, affordable, and hygienic food, one delivery at a time!

headline: Landside Operations Associate - Commercial at Gateway Terminals India Pvt. Ltd. | Skilled Multi-tasker
current_company: Gateway Terminals India Pvt. Ltd. [APM Terminal Mumbai]
summary:
APM Terminals Mumbai, also known as Gateway Terminals India (GTI) is India’s busiest container terminal handling facility, operating from Nhava Sheva's Jawaharlal Nehru Port Authority (JNPA). The terminal with a capacity of  2 million TEUs, is a joint venture between APM Terminals and the Container Corporation of India (CONCOR- A Government of India undertaking). APM Terminals Mumbai is a part of global APM Terminals which has a network of 65 operating ports and terminal facilities, employing 22,000 professionals across 37 countries around the world.

Being strategically located, all major shipping lines call at the Terminal. Elephanta Island, which faces the terminal on one side, acts as a break water and protects from tidal disturbances and storms. With the ongoing investment in infrastructure, the container handling capacity of the terminal will increase by 10% to 2.20 million TEUs.

With 24x7 operation and 3,500 truck movements per day, in 2022 alone, the terminal catered to 571 vessel calls.


APM Terminals Mumbai is well connected to:
- Indian hinterland via national highways and state highway
- ICD locations and CFSs across the country via rail and road
- Mumbai via upcoming Mumbai Trans Harbour Link (MTHL)
- Northern India via electrified route with the upcoming Dedicated Freight Corridor (DFC) from Dadri to JNPT.
column15: As a Landside Operations Associate at APMT Mumbai, I provide efficient and reliable service to customers and stakeholders in the container terminal industry. I have a Bachelor of Commerce degree from MIEM and over 5 years of work experience in customer service roles. I have excellent skills in Microsoft Excel, phone etiquette, and multi-tasking, as well as a passion for travel and logistics. I have previously worked as a Customer Service Associate at APMT Mumbai, where I handled queries, complaints, and requests from customers and agents, and as a Travel Consultant at Cleartrip, where I helped business travellers plan, book, and manage their travel arrangements. I am a team player, a problem solver, and a fast learner, who strives to deliver high-quality results and satisfaction to the customers and the company. I am always eager to learn new skills and improve my competencies in the field of landside operations.

headline: Territory Sales Manager | Driving Revenue Growth & Market Expansion
summary:
Globus Medical, Inc. is a leading musculoskeletal solutions company and is driving significant technological advancements across a complete suite of products. Founded in 2003, Globus’ single-minded focus on advancing surgery has made it the fastest growing company in the history of orthopedics. Globus is driven to utilize superior engineering and technology to achieve pain free, active lives for all patients.

Additional information can be accessed at www.globusmedical.com.

• All legitimate Globus Medical recruiter email addresses end with “@globusmedical.com”
• No application process should include a cloud-based document (ex. Google doc) asking for personal information

headline: Territory Sales Manager at Diageo
summary:
Diageo's official LinkedIn account. We're a global leader in premium drinks, across spirits and beer, a business built on the principles and foundations laid by the giants of the industry.

With over 200 brands sold in 180 countries, our portfolio has remarkable breadth. From centuries-old names to exciting new entrants, and global giants to local legends, we're building the very best brands out there, and with over 30,000 talented people based in over 135 countries, we're a truly global company. With such diversity, we're able to truly represent our broad consumer base and think differently about the future.

To maintain our position as leaders in the alcoholic beverage market, we always invest in the future and are mindful of the impact we have. Because just like the legends of our past, we're here to raise the bar – for people as well as the planet.

Matrix Cellular provides services all around the world and has offices across India. It provides International SIM cards for business travelers, leisure travelers and students in both post-paid and prepaid models. 

It also offers add-on data packs for using internet on mobile phones as well as data cards for accessing internet on a computer. Matrix Cellular has forayed into travel card by introducing Matrix Forex card, designed to give the customer secure and hassle-free travel experience. The Company also introduced International Travel Insurance for all Indians traveling abroad.

The Company was also awarded with the Innovative Product Award – International Mobile Connections and Data Products” by Economic Times Telecom Awards (2011). It has been enlisted in "Delhi-NCR Hot 50 Brands"​ consecutively for two years, 2014 and 2015 organized by Paul Writer.

headline: Sales Development Representative @ Globiva | Bachelor of Commerce
summary:
Globiva is India’s most promising & fastest growing Business Process Management (BPM) company. We are focused on delivering awesome customer experiences for our clients. We commenced operations in early 2018 and since then, have grown to 5000+ employees servicing 40+ customers from 4 delivery centers in Gurgaon , Bangalore & Kolkata. All of this is an outcome of the fundamentals on which this company was built - Employee First, Value Delivery & Customer Focus. These guiding principles allow us to continue being flexible, agile and quick to respond to clients’ shifting needs. 

Our solutions include:

Customer Interaction:
Whether clients are looking for service, sales support or retention, our experienced support experts provide them with consistently robust services that delivers some of the highest CSAT and NPS scores in the industry. We hire and manage experienced staff to keep clients focused on scaling and expanding their business while we manage what goes on in the contact center. 

Content Curation:
Globiva has deep knowledge and experience in curating and moderating content specifically for ecommerce and online tech organizations. We make sure that the tone and quality of content meets the brand’s standards & guidelines. 

Finance & Accounting:
Globiva brings in a unique amalgamation of Finance & Accounts (F&A) BPO services delivery capability and ability to drive in optimal automation across complete F&A value chain. We offer comprehensive support ranging from transactional processes to advanced areas such as FP&A. We have partnerships to address typical F&A challenges with bolt-on tools and Robotics Process Automation (RPA).

To learn more, visit www.globiva.com
